{{Quote|We have eight MT-AT vehicles loaded into the Dreadnaught ''Vendetta'', along with a full compliment of troops and weaponry.|A stormtrooper lieutenant to Ambassador Furgan|<ref name="CotF">''[[Champions of the Force]]''</ref>}}
The '''Mountain Terrain Armored Transport (MT-AT)''' was an arachnid-like eight-legged [[Walker/Legends|walker]], apparently designed on the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Fortress world/Legends|fortress world]] of [[Carida/Legends|Carida]]. This design earned it the nickname "Spider Walker".

==Characteristics==
[[File:MT-AT_egvv.jpg|thumb|left|MT-AT schematics.]]
Each walker-unit was deployed on-[[Planet/Legends|planet]] by a [[cocoon pod]], similar to the deployment of [[Arakyd Industries/Legends|Arakyd]] [[Viper probe droid/Legends|Viper probe droids]], and emerged from the impact crater fully operational. These cocoon pods encased the walker in a fluid gel that protected its descent to a planet's surface.<ref name="EGtV&V">''[[The Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]''</ref>

A droid brain in the pod controlled the speed and direction and activated decelerating thrusters shortly before impact. When the pod impacted on the surface, the bistate gel hardened, absorbing the kinetic energy and protecting the walker from damage.<ref name="EGtV&V" />

==History==
[[File:MT-AT_EGVV.jpg|thumb|MT-AT.]]The MT-AT was based on the design of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[LM-432 crab droid/Legends|LM-432 crab droid]] used at [[Imperial Academy/Legends|Imperial academies]] following the end of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="TNEGtD">''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]''</ref>

MT-ATs saw action during the attempted kidnapping of [[Anakin Solo]] while he was still a baby, even though half of the force was destroyed by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar's]] [[Foreign Intruder Defense Organism|FIDO]] unit.
All but one of the vehicles were destroyed during the kidnapping attempt, thanks to sturdy Alliance defenses.<ref name="CotF" />

==Appearances==
*[[Dark Apprentice (novel)|''Dark Apprentice'']] {{1stm}}
*''[[Champions of the Force]]'' {{1st}}
